overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character moves from a neon-lit main boulevard with towering corporate buildings through progressively darker urban streets and alleys, ending in a secluded courtyard with a campfire.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban boulevard with corporate towers

events.description: blue sports car drives past on the left side of the street
character crosses the street and turns right at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk of a neon-lit city street, observing passing traffic and the towering corporate buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving along the street
white sedan waiting at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall corporate towers with bright neon signage visible in the distance
low-rise commercial building with illuminated windows facing the street
asphalt road with lane markings and crosswalk lines
tall street lamp post with overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit city boulevard with massive corporate towers glowing in the background. A blue sports car passes by on the left as the character approaches an intersection, then crosses the street and turns right onto a secondary road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with large digital billboards

events.description: turns onto secondary street featuring large digital billboards and utility poles
white truck drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along a secondary road lined with digital advertisements and overhead wires

notable_agents.action: white truck driving along the road

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying animated car advertisement
wooden utility pole with multiple wire connections
overhead electrical wires crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character moves along a secondary street dominated by a large digital billboard on the right. The neon towers fade from view as the character passes utility poles and overhead wires, with a white truck driving by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with parked vehicles and metal fencing

events.description: lighting becomes darker and more subdued as character moves away from neon-lit commercial area
turns right into a parking lot area leading to a narrow alley

agents.ego_description: walking down a dimly lit street past parked vans and industrial buildings, heading toward an alley entrance

entered.detail: dark colored van parked on the side of the road
metal barricade fencing along the sidewalk edge
low industrial building with metal siding and small windows

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a darker industrial street with parked vans and metal fencing. The bright neon signs are now behind as the lighting becomes more subdued. The character turns right into a parking lot area, approaching a narrow alley entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with pink neon lighting and debris

events.description: enters narrow alleyway from the main street, walls closing in on both sides
pink neon light becomes visible ahead, illuminating the alley walls

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow debris-filled alleyway toward a pink neon light source deep in the passage

entered.detail: narrow passage between buildings leading to inner courtyard
bright pink neon illumination coming from deep in the alley
scattered garbage, cardboard boxes, and litter along the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed alleyway, leaving the open street behind. Trash and debris line the concrete walls as the character moves toward a bright pink neon light glowing at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: secluded courtyard with campfire and makeshift camp

events.description: discovers a campfire burning in a metal barrel in the secluded courtyard
slows down and approaches the campfire area cautiously

agents.ego_description: approaching a campfire in a secluded courtyard, observing the makeshift camp and surrounding rubble

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire burning inside, providing warm orange light
small makeshift tent set up against the concrete wall
pile of concrete rubble and construction debris
high concrete walls enclosing the courtyard on all sides

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the character enters a secluded courtyard enclosed by high concrete walls. A campfire burns in a metal barrel near a makeshift tent, casting flickering orange light on the surrounding rubble and trash. The pink neon glow remains visible in the distance behind the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant, neon-lit corporate boulevard into the dim, industrial shadows of a city backstreet. It begins with the character walking past massive glowing towers as a blue sports car streaks by, moving steadily toward a busy intersection. As the character crosses the street and turns onto a secondary road, the towering corporate skyline fades from view, replaced by the glare of a large digital billboard and a network of overhead utility wires. The scene then shifts into a darker industrial zone where the bright neon lights vanish, leaving the character to pass parked vans and metal fencing under subdued lighting. Finally, the camera follows the character as they turn right into a parking lot and approach the mouth of a narrow, secluded alley.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into a secluded, firelit sanctuary. It begins as the character leaves the open street to enter a narrow enclosed passage, moving past concrete walls lined with trash and debris. As the character advances, the perspective is drawn toward a bright pink neon light glowing at the far end of the alley. The scene then opens into a secluded courtyard enclosed by high walls, where the pink glow recedes into the distance behind the character. Finally, the lighting shifts to a flickering orange hue as the camera settles on a campfire burning in a metal barrel beside a makeshift tent and scattered rubble.
